# KanjiTest.Online — Comprehensive Japanese Study Platform
> Free JLPT kanji flashcards, grammar lessons, quizzes, and study tools for learners of all levels.
> https://www.kanjitest.online

## Key Resources

- Homepage: https://www.kanjitest.online/
- Learn Section: https://www.kanjitest.online/learn/
- Blog: https://www.kanjitest.online/blog/
- Tools: https://www.kanjitest.online/tools/
- Open Source Data: https://www.kanjitest.online/open-source/
- Word of the Day: https://www.kanjitest.online/word-of-the-day/

## JLPT Levels

- N5 (Foundations, 79 kanji, 20 grammar points): https://www.kanjitest.online/n5/
- N4 (Building blocks, 168 kanji, 14 grammar points): https://www.kanjitest.online/n4/
- N3 (Confidence, 368 kanji, 12 grammar points): https://www.kanjitest.online/n3/
- N2 (Advanced, 382 kanji, 14 grammar points): https://www.kanjitest.online/n2/
- N1 (Mastery, 1234 kanji, 16 grammar points): https://www.kanjitest.online/n1/

## Learning Paths

- Radicals (214 Kangxi): https://www.kanjitest.online/learn/radicals/
- Hiragana: https://www.kanjitest.online/learn/hiragana/
- Katakana: https://www.kanjitest.online/learn/katakana/
- Particles: https://www.kanjitest.online/learn/particles/
- Stories: https://www.kanjitest.online/stories/

## JSON APIs (Open Data)

- All Kanji by Level: https://www.kanjitest.online/api/decks.json
- All Kanji (flat): https://www.kanjitest.online/api/kanji.json
- Grammar Points: https://www.kanjitest.online/api/grammar.json
- Radicals: https://www.kanjitest.online/api/radicals.json

## Features by Level

Each JLPT level page includes:
- Study guides with detailed kanji breakdowns
- Interactive flashcards with swipe/ keyboard navigation
- Vocabulary lists with example sentences
- Grammar lessons with formation, usage, and examples
- Multiple-choice / written kanji tests
- Progress tracking (localStorage)

## Tools

https://www.kanjitest.online/tools/ — 30+ study tools including:
- Kanji Worksheet Generator, Memory Match, Reading Quiz, Vocabulary Quiz
- Text Analyzer, Kanji Highlighter, Stroke Count Lookup
- Study Timer, Streak Tracker, Romaji Converter
- Age/Numbers/Weather/Professions vocabulary guides

## Content

- Blog: Japanese learning strategies, JLPT tips, app reviews
- Open datasets under MIT License
- Built with Astro + React + Tailwind CSS
